name: I Expect You To Die: Home Sweet Home

reviews.review_title: Why was this hidden on quest three?
reviews.review_description:
I found this game while sclolling through the Meta store a long time ago and i now cant find it unless i go to app settings im not saying its bad i
though im just wondering why this is happening

I can't go in 😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭don't 
Buy it

The box at the start seems fun, but I couldn't get past the next step. The wall seems to appear mirrored/facing the wrong way, and there's absolutely no way to click the buttons to move forward. I tried three times in different rooms but couldn't get past that step. 

If this is what IEYTD is like, I'll give it a wide berth.
This game is very short and has many bugs, so this game is sh!t

reviews.review_title: It’s a free I expect you to die game!
reviews.review_description: Before I bought the new I expect you to die 3 game on steam I didn’t know of this and after I played it I noticed there’s another i expect you to die game and it’s free! I think it’s something really cool and it’s free!! I love i expect you to die franchise and I can’t wait to see more, I really like the concept for this!

reviews.review_title: Great Spin-off From the Main Games!
reviews.review_description: Honestly as a free game its got its flaws but it's still a good free game that haves you solve puzzles in your own house.

But it needs better save points.
Suddenly died within seconds and had to go back all the way to the beginning.
It's very cool, especially for the price.  So good. I just wish it was longer.  More. More. More.

I'm never good at these strategy games, but I enjoyed swatting at the killer wasps coming out of my laundry room. Sure, my right hand disappeared now and then, but this is the game I use to show off the Meta Quest Pro.  I hope it turns into a full fledged game.

reviews.review_title: good as a first attempt, but needs more
reviews.review_description:
i forgot about this for a long while and tried it recently.
the MR is a bit buggy, like when you first appear if one of the box caps appears past a physical wall, you can see it but cant interact with it. similar thing happened with the tesla machine.
introductin of the vission modes was intereting and made for some differant puzzles.
it leaves me wanting more. i hope a some point we might have a follow up.
my only comment is a lot of the game in demos ar showing large living rooms and houses, not everyone has the luxury or space.
pretty please could we have a follow up in the future?
I absolutely love this game

It's probably really good, it's a nice, free spin off of the main games, but the download won't work for me, but once I get it on properly I'm sure it'll be a 5 star. I'm editing this and I got it to download and WOW. I haven't played the main series but If this is an app lab game then I'm saving up for the 3 games, and you should too or at least 1.

i have played this game luke 5 times now but i wich there was so much more overall  if this costed money then get the games but if you cant afford the games or if youve played the games and are looking for more then this is a good game to get also since its free just get it
this game has way too many bug to play. I have the one that cost money and I wanted to try this one and it is a trash ahh game

Downloaded this free game because it was Mixed Reality and I was hoping to find another game like Drop Dead - Home Invasion. It didn't disappoint, ended up purchasing the triple pack of this game series because of it!
So this game is good but the thing I’m thinking you could do is make this game on the quest 3 because on the quest 3 it has real colour let me know if that’s a good idea

I did a poor job with the walls and couldn't redo, i didn't even get out of the box. Maybe the game devs could add a quick menu of some sort to redraw boundaries, overall a great game by the looks of it with high potential
This is a good game on the first part was hard hit my wall

The game itself is very entertaining but I have a problem. I didn't add any walls cause I was in a hurry and I accidentally skipped it, and the worst part is, it won't let me recreate my walls which makes it difficult because I can't scan anything with the bug finder since I don't have any walls, Please add a button to where you can recreate your walls. And I give it a 3 star because the game stays broken without the walls, Please fix this and thank you.
